message:
feat: add table view toggle, TSV copy, and CSV export to beads-viewer New table controls toolbar injected above each data table in the beads viewer: - View toggle button cycles between card layout and traditional table layout, syncs across all tables on the page, and persists the preference to localStorage (key: bv-table-view-pref) - Copy TSV button extracts table data and copies tab-separated values to the clipboard with visual feedback - Download CSV button generates an RFC 4180-compliant CSV blob download Supporting CSS: - .bv-table-controls toolbar (hidden until hover on desktop, always visible on mobile) with .bv-table-ctrl-btn button styles - .bv-table--force-cards class overrides desktop layout to full card mode (visually-hidden thead, rounded card rows, data-label pseudo- elements for n-column tables) - .bv-table--force-table class restores standard table rendering on mobile when the user prefers it JS helpers: - cellText() strips HTML and handles
elements - extractTableData() returns { headers, rows } from a table element - tableToTSV() and tableToCSV() produce properly escaped output - injectTableControls() is idempotent (no duplicate toolbars) - All new functions exported on window.beadsViewer Tests (beads-viewer-table-export.spec.ts): - 7 export tests covering basic TSV/CSV, tab/comma/quote escaping, HTML link stripping, inline code, and empty cells - 5 control injection tests covering toolbar creation, idempotency, view toggle persistence, localStorage restore, and keyboard a11y Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6
